g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I describe my intent to Claude Code before starting work?')
g.text: State your intent → prompt Claude to validate each one → document in GitHub Issues with code refs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I validate GitHub Issues before starting implementation?')
g.text: Review all created issues in a fresh context · confirm each is accurate and complete

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do parallel subagents work in Claude Code for enriching GitHub issues?')
g.text: Each subagent adds context, root cause analysis, and solutions as comments to its assigned issue

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I group GitHub issues for Claude Code to work on?')
g.text: Provide issue list · Claude groups related issues and resolves them by reference for clean review

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should go in a checklist.md for Claude Code context management?')
g.text: Local file only · never committed · Claude updates it to fight context rot as it works through issues

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should Claude Code handle tests when fixing issues?')
g.text: Fix each issue in its group · write tests · fix regressions · delete stale tests · commit by reference

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should a Claude Code generated PR description include?')
g.text: PR to target branch · description references issues solved · easy to trace and review later

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why should checklist.md never be committed to git?')
g.text: Instruct Claude to delete it before the PR · local only · never in git history
